items.title: Hardwick a Hawks favourite, Adelaide's "big problem", Saints going through the grades
items.description: Damian Barrett and Joel Peterson bring you the latest footy news on AFL Daily. Hawthorn came from behind to continue their unbeaten run in Tassie. Blake Hardwick's 4 goals helped to overcome the Adelaide Crows. Who wants to win it more? That's the question heading into Dreamtime …
